name: Youtopia
short_description: Youtopia - You awaken in an empty city. How did You get here? Where is Everyone? Collect ALL of the Clues to solve the Mystery!
detailed_description:
Youtopia

You awaken in an unfamiliar city.

There doesn't seem to be anyone around for miles.

How did You get here?

Where is Everyone?

Collect ALL of the Clues to solve the Mystery!

Features:

A fun and challenging mystery simulator game

Hyper photorealistic city to explore

Exterior and Interior areas

Look for clues scattered all over the city

Are You really alone here?

You can also try the Following Challenges . . .

"Easter Egg" Challenge - How many other Archor Games Logos Appear in the Game ?

"Speed Run" Challenge - What is the Fastest Time You can complete the game ?

"Scenic" Pictures Challenge - Take Screenshots of the Beautiful City and share them on Social Media with Your Friends.

"Walkthrough" Challenge - Post a video of a Complete 'Walkthrough' of the entire Game.

"Steamy Streamer" Challenge - Get ALL of the Archor Games products available on Steam and Stream ALL of them Beginning to End.

... and more!
